package.name: patrol_mission
package.description: Mission orchestration for the patrol-drone stack (docset 02-mission-control). Hosts the ROS-free MissionStateMachine / FrameConversion / MissionConfig decision layer and the thin PatrolMissionNode rclpy plumbing that drives PX4 offboard control over uXRCE-DDS. M3 lands the basic mission (arm/takeoff/ hover/land); M4 adds patrol/waypoints/abort.
